steps.label: Choose the on-page starting point
steps.guidance: Start with county and posture. If the county is uncertain, use the on-page statewide guidance first.

steps.label: Use a reviewed route when available
steps.guidance: Reviewed routes open approved PDFs in the on-page viewer without collecting sensitive facts.

steps.label: Keep non-reviewed counties source-only
steps.guidance: For monitored counties without packet review, use Guided Intake instead of guessing.

steps.label: Use MFLG calculators on this page
steps.guidance: Use the MFLG child-support and spousal-maintenance calculators on this page for planning. Official Arizona sources remain available as fallback.

steps.label: Start Guided Intake when facts matter
steps.guidance: Carry only the source, county, issue, posture, packet, or calculator choice into Intake. Do not collect allegations, uploads, or detailed financial facts here.

public_message: Use on-page reviewed forms and site PDF downloads first, reviewed Maricopa routes when available, MFLG calculators for planning, and Guided Intake when facts require review.
